hypothesis: Fine-tuning SAM-2 on synthetic LPTEM video data will produce a model (SAM-EM) that outperforms a U-Net baseline in segmentation and tracking accuracy—measured by higher Jaccard index, F1-score, composite J&F, and closer centroid agreement—across varying liquid thicknesses (SNR), resolutions, and particle interaction scenarios, and generalizes to real LPTEM videos enabling real-time analysis.
